stableYield.title: Stable Yield Splitter
stableYield.subtitle: Estimate how to split stablecoins across exchanges and APR tiers for better projected yield.
stableYield.description: Use this estimator to distribute your stablecoins across current offers. APR values are annual rates and estimates only.
stableYield.noResults: No matching results for current filters.
stableYield.enterAmountHint: Enter a valid amount greater than 0 to see allocation estimates.
stableYield.disclaimerText: This tool provides estimated returns based on manually maintained APR data. It does not guarantee income, and actual rates can change at any time.
